summary: Iteration 21 - Version 2.5.0 Option Chain Fix VERIFIED. 16 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. Option Chain now correctly shows 'market_closed' for NSE instruments and 'broker_disconnected' for MCX instruments when market is open but no broker. NO simulation fallback - empty chain when not live.

issues: 404 error for favicon - cosmetic, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: get_live_option_chain() correctly implements 3-step check: (1) market status, (2) broker connection, (3) live data fetch
No simulation fallback - returns empty chain with appropriate source when market closed or broker disconnected
Market hours service correctly distinguishes NSE (9:15 AM - 3:30 PM) vs MCX (9:00 AM - 11:30 PM)
Frontend OptionChain.js shows proper status cards with icons: Clock for market_closed, WifiOff for broker_disconnected, AlertCircle for broker_error
Badges correctly show MARKET CLOSED, BROKER OFFLINE, DATA ERROR based on source field
test_credentials: None required - all brokers disconnected, testing market status logic
context_for_next_testing_agent: Version 2.5.0 Option Chain fix fully tested. Previously Option Chain always showed simulated Black-Scholes data. Now it correctly returns source='market_closed' when NSE/BSE closed (after 3:30 PM IST), source='broker_disconnected' when MCX open but no broker connected, and source='live' only when live broker data is available. Empty chain returned for non-live sources.

instruments_returns_9.result: Returns all 9 instruments (NIFTY50, BANKNIFTY, FINNIFTY, MIDCPNIFTY, SENSEX, BANKEX, CRUDEOIL, GOLD, SILVER)

nifty50_market_closed.result: source='market_closed', chain=[], market_message='Market Closed - After Trading Hours'

crudeoil_broker_disconnected.result: source='broker_disconnected', chain=[], message='Broker not connected. Please login to your broker first.'

no_simulation_fallback.result: All sources are correctly market_closed, broker_disconnected, broker_error, or live

empty_chain_when_not_live.test: Chain should be empty unless source='live'

frontend_market_closed_card.result: Shows status card with Clock icon, 'Market Closed - After Trading Hours', next open time

frontend_broker_offline_card.result: Shows status card with WifiOff icon, 'Broker Not Connected', instructions to connect broker

frontend_market_closed_badge.result: Shows 'MARKET CLOSED' amber badge for NSE instruments

frontend_broker_offline_badge.result: Shows 'BROKER OFFLINE' red badge for MCX instruments

frontend_no_empty_table.test: Option chain table and legend should NOT appear when chain is empty
frontend_no_empty_table.result: Verified - only status card displayed, no empty table or legend

mocked_apis_note: No APIs mocked. Testing real market status detection and broker connection checks.

bug_fix_verified.original_bug: Option Chain always showed simulated Black-Scholes model data regardless of instrument or market status
bug_fix_verified.fix_applied: Implemented 3-step check: (1) market status, (2) broker connection, (3) live data fetch. No simulation fallback.
bug_fix_verified.verification: CONFIRMED - NSE instruments show market_closed when closed, MCX instruments show broker_disconnected when open but no broker
